info.english_meaning: to anointto besmearto coverto spread overto stain
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: upadehaH - vfdDiH iti kzIrasvAmI  ' asya dAhanArTakatvamapi Aha SaNkarAcAryaH ' iti DAtukAvyavyAKyAyAm  (2.58) ' upadAhe ' iti mEtreyaH  nyAsakAropi (3.1.138) evameva

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sa triviDaH--pralepaH pradeha AlepaSca' (suSruta0 sUtra0 183) tezAmantaram--pralepaH SItastanuraviSozI viSozI vA pradehastUzRaH SIto bahalo'bahuraviSozI ca maDyamo'trAlepaH
'karRA yAmyAH avaliptA rOdrAH naBorUpAH pArjanyAH' avaliptA dUzitAH avaSabdo lepasya dOzwyamAha
'gurorapyavaliptasya kAryAkAryamajAnataH utpaTaM pratipannasya kAryaM Bavati SAsanam' (rA0 22113) avaliptasya garvitasya
'avaliptaM muKaM brahman divyAnganDAn biBarmi ca' (BA0 Adi0 16737) avaliptaM dUzitaM lAlAdinA avalepaH syAd garve lepane dvezaRepi ceti medinI
'asya gaNge'valepasya sadyaH PalamavApnuhi' (hari0 1277) avalepo garvaH darpaH
'rUpyaBARqaM GanaM suziraM vA suvarRArDenAvalepayet' (kO0 a0 21345) adalepayet upadihyAt

'upadeha upacayaH ktAdalpAKyAyAm' (415??) ityatra aBraviliptI dyOrityudAharaRaM vfttO aBraviliptI=alpABrA viSabdo'lpatvasya dyotakaH ata eva candanAnuliptA brAhmaRIti pratyudAharaRe'nuSabdo vyApterdyotakaH prayuktaH
'(vajreRa) tenAhamamU~ senAM nilimpAmi' (aTarva0 111013) nilimpAmi CinadmIti sAyaRaH aBAvamApAdayAmi adfSyAM karomItyanye
'ni ketavo janAnAM nyadfzwA alipsata' (f0 11514) nyalipsata lipe rluNi praTamapuruzabahuvacane rUpam
'DuniSca DvAntaSca DvanaSca DvanayaMSca nilimpaSca vilimpaSca vikzipaH' (tE0 A0 424)
'vidyAdrasaM svAduM yo vaktramupalimpati' (vAgBawa0 102) vaktramupalimpati vaktre sakto Bavati
'izumAtrAvaraM sarvataH sTaRqilamupalipya' (ASva0 gf0 131) upalipya upalepamupadehaM kftvA
